final:
// // This module implements a 4-bit shift register with load and clear functionalities. When the clear signal is deactivated, the output is reset to zero. Upon receiving a clock pulse, if the load signal is deasserted, the register takes in the 4-bit input data. If neither condition is met, it performs a circular right shift on the current output, shifting the bits to the right and wrapping the least significant bit back to the most significant position.
module top_module(
    input load,
    input clear,
    input clk,
    input [3:0] data_in,
    output reg [3:0] data_out
);always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (clear) begin
            data_out <= 4'b0000;
        end else if (load) begin
            data_out <= data_in;
        end else begin
            data_out <= {data_out[2:0], data_out[3]};
        end
    end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 4-bit shift register with load and clear functionalities. When the clear signal is deactivated, the output is reset to zero. Upon receiving a clock pulse, if the load signal is deasserted, the register takes in the 4-bit input data. If neither condition is met, it performs a circular right shift on the current output, shifting the bits to the right and wrapping the least significant bit back to the most significant position.
